heading: Subcontracting plan reports
label: 637d Subcontracting plan reports
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2013, and not as part of the Small Business Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Reporting requirements
children.label: 1 Reporting requirements
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Administrator of the Small Business Administration shall take such actions as are necessary to ensure that the electronic subcontracting reporting system established by the Administration to carry out the requirement of is modified to ensure that it can identify entities that fail to submit required reports.January 2, 2013section 637(d)(6)(E) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the percentage of entities required to submit reports pursuant to that filed such reports and that failed to file such reports during the prior fiscal year;section 637(d)(6) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the percentage of entities filing such reports that met, exceeded, or failed to meet goals set forth in their subcontracting plans during the prior fiscal year; and

children.label: C
children.text: the aggregate value by which such entities exceeded, or failed to meet, their subcontracting goals during the prior fiscal year.
